User-agent: *
Allow: /

Purpose:
This website provides scam detection tools, scam reports, and educational content for identifying online fraud, phishing attempts, and malicious websites.

Primary pages:
https://scamchecker.app/check
https://scamchecker.app/guides
https://scamchecker.app/reports

Focus:
Cybersecurity, scam detection, phishing prevention, fraud awareness.
